title: Thermal And Space
description: Thermal And Space add Thermal ores to Ad Astra Planets
body:
![Thermal And Space Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/Thermal-And-Space/master/src/main/resources/assets/thermal_and_space/thermal_in_space.png)
# What is Thermal And Space?
Thermal And Space is an Ad Astra and Thermal addon that add Thermal Ores to Ad Astra Planets.
# Where does the ores spawn?
- Oil Shale is found on the Moon, Mars and Venus.
- Apatite is found on the Moon, Mars  and Venus.
- Cinnabar is found on Mercury, Mars, Venus.
- Lead is found on Venus, Glacio and Mars.
- Nickel is found on Mercury and The Moon.
- Niter is found on Mercury, Glacio and The Moon.
- Ruby is found on The Moon, Mars and Venus.
- Sapphire is found on Mercury and Venus.
- Silver is found on The Moon, Mars, Mercury and Venus.
- Tin is found on all planets => The Moon, Mars, Mercury, Venus, Glacio.

All the ores have higher spawn rate than Thermal's Overwold ores.
# Can i tweak the oregen?

Yes you can, the oregen is done via datapack.

You need to change the placed features at `resources/data/thermal/worldgen/placed_feature/space_orename.json`.
